headline: CF Industries Holdings Inc (NYSE:CF): A Quality Play at a Bargain Price
summary: CF Industries passes the Caviar Cruise quality screen with strong ROIC, low debt, and high profit margins. Despite flat revenue growth, EBIT surged 30% annually. Trading at a P/E of 10.27, it offers quality at a value price.
